title: amygdalus eriogyna
intro: Amygdalus eriogyna, also known as the Algerian apricot kernel tree, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of Amygdalus eriogyna lie in its kernel, which contains a compound called amygdalin, a natural source of cyanogenic glycosides with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amygdalus eriogyna kernel include its potential to support weight loss, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Amygdalus eriogyna kernel typically involve cold-pressing the kernel to extract its oil, which can be used in capsules or added to topical creams for its medicinal properties.
